message:
test(mux,codec): add layout naming, persistence, and PDU stream decode tests (ft-1memj.29)

Layout tests (layout.rs):
- SwapLayout create-named, create-without-description
- Layout persistence via JSON roundtrip (Vec<SwapLayout>)
- LayoutCycle from custom layouts
- Split size edge cases: 1-col terminal, 1-row terminal
- Arrangement equality and clone independence

Codec tests (codec_coverage.rs):
- Stream decode for CreateFloatingPane, SwapToLayout, UpdatePaneConstraints
- Incremental byte-at-a-time decode for MoveFloatingPane
- All 10 FrankenTerm PDU unique name verification
- Edge cases: empty layout_names, all-None/all-Some constraints
- CycleStack forward/backward stream decode roundtrip

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
